latin: Si iterum Tobiam et Hitlerum in conclavi eodem viderem, et duo tela haberem, bis Tobiam feriam. Michael Tobiam oderat plus quam quemquam.

questions.prompt: What would Michael do with two shots?
What does this reveal about Michael's feelings?
questions.target: He hates Toby more than anyone
choices: He hates Toby more than anyone

translation: If I saw Toby and Hitler in the same room again, and I had two shots, I would shoot Toby twice. Michael hated Toby more than anyone.
